arts.ttl: Bayern Munich produce fitting Allianz Arena send off for Thomas Müller with Gladbach win
arts.sum: Thomas Müller's final Bundesliga home game for Bayern Munich ended in sweet victory, as the recently-crowned Bundesliga champions saw off the challenge of Borussia Mönchengladbach with goals from Harry Kane and Michael Olise. Müller continued to influence the game at the other end, his trademark intelligent movement and link-up play delighting home fans in what would be his last Bundesliga appearance at the Allianz Arena.
